properties.name: ai-lens.buffer-size
properties.description: Maximum number of LLM calls to keep in the in-memory ring buffer.

properties.name: ai-lens.anomaly.latency-threshold
properties.description: Multiplier above average latency to flag a call as a latency spike. Default is 2.0 (2x average).

properties.name: ai-lens.anomaly.token-threshold
properties.description: Multiplier above average token count to flag a call as a token spike. Default is 2.0 (2x average).

properties.name: ai-lens.anomaly.min-baseline-calls
properties.description: Minimum number of calls required before anomaly detection kicks in.

properties.name: ai-lens.dashboard.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the embedded dashboard at /ai-lens.

properties.name: ai-lens.dashboard.path
properties.description: URL path for the embedded dashboard.

properties.name: ai-lens.diff.alert-on-change
properties.description: Log a WARN when a prompt template change is detected for a model.

properties.name: ai-lens.diff.webhook-url
properties.description: Optional URL to POST a JSON payload to whenever a prompt template change is detected.
